```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
target_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_count = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k not in target_states)

assert target_states == {"101", "110"}
assert target_count > 0
assert target_count >= 0.8 * shots
assert target_count > non_target_count
for state in target_states:
    assert counts.get(state, 0) >= 0.2 * shots
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
total_shots = shots if shots is not None else sum(counts.values())

target_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_count = total_shots - target_count

assert target_states == {"101", "110"}
assert target_count > 0
assert target_count >= 0.75 * total_shots
assert counts.get("101", 0) > 0
assert counts.get("110", 0) > 0
assert non_target_count <= 0.25 * total_shots
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
target_total = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_total = sum(v for k, v in counts.items() if k not in target_states)

assert target_states == {"101", "110"}
assert target_total > 0
assert target_total > non_target_total
assert target_total >= 0.7 * shots

top_states = sorted(counts.items(), key=lambda kv: kv[1], reverse=True)[:2]
assert {state for state, _ in top_states} == target_states
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Expected total counts to equal shots ({shots}), got {total}"

target_counts = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_counts = total - target_counts

assert len(target_states) == 2
for state in target_states:
    assert counts.get(state, 0) > 0, f"Target state {state} was not observed"

assert target_counts / total >= 0.7, f"Target states not sufficiently concentrated: {target_counts}/{total}"
assert target_counts > non_target_counts, f"Non-target outcomes dominate: target={target_counts}, non_target={non_target_counts}"
```

```python
target_states = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Total counted shots {total} != shots {shots}"

target_count = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in target_states)
non_target_count = total - target_count

assert target_count > 0, "No shots measured on target states"
assert target_count >= 0.75 * total, f"Target states not sufficiently concentrated: {target_count}/{total}"
assert all(counts.get(state, 0) > 0 for state in target_states), f"Expected both target states to appear: {target_states}"
assert non_target_count <= 0.25 * total, f"Too many non-target measurements: {non_target_count}/{total}"
```

```python
targets = set(metadata.get("target_states", ["101", "110"]))
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Expected total counts to equal shots: {total} != {shots}"

target_counts = sum(counts.get(state, 0) for state in targets)
non_target_counts = total - target_counts

assert target_counts / total >= 0.75, f"Target states not sufficiently concentrated: {target_counts}/{total}"
assert non_target_counts / total <= 0.25, f"Too much probability on non-target states: {non_target_counts}/{total}"

for state in targets:
    assert counts.get(state, 0) > 0, f"Missing target state in results: {state}"
```
